SUBJECT: Your Email Reply Could Not Be Processed
ERROR_INVALID_LINK: The reply link has expired or is invalid.
ERROR_USER_NOT_FOUND: We could not find an account associated with this reply link.
ERROR_COMMENT_NOT_FOUND: The comment you tried to reply to no longer exists.
ERROR_SAVE_FAILED: We were unable to save your reply due to an internal error.
ERROR_DM_CONVERSATION_NOT_FOUND: The conversation you tried to reply to was not found.
ERROR_DM_SENDER_NOT_AUTHORIZED: You are not authorized to reply to this conversation.
ERROR_UNKNOWN: An unexpected error occurred while processing your reply.
HELP: Please try replying directly on the website instead.
